title: Unique Torch Tops
description: All torches have a unique top texture that is smoother and more consistent.
body:
Changes all torches (and blocks including torches) to have a **unique top texture** that is smoother and more consistent. That's all. This pack is compatible with my [Redder Redstone Torches]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redder-redstone-torches](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redder-redstone-torches)) pack, providing a unique top texture for its Redstone Torch. To use both, have this pack be selected **BELOW** the Redder Redstone Torches pack.
